name: infinite_loop_zom_of_zom
description: TOKEN <- [a-z0-9]* can match empty, making TOKEN* infinite
grammar:
ROOT <- WH TOKEN* WH
TOKEN <- [a-z0-9]*
WH <- [ \t]*

name: infinite_loop_oom_of_zom
description: TOKEN+ where TOKEN can match empty is still infinite
grammar:
ROOT <- WH TOKEN+ WH
TOKEN <- [a-z0-9]*
WH <- [ \t]*

name: infinite_loop_not_predicate
description: Not-predicate alone can match empty, making repetition infinite
grammar:
ROOT <- WH TOKEN* WH
TOKEN <- !'word1'
WH <- [ \t]*

name: infinite_loop_and_predicate
description: And-predicate alone can match empty, making repetition infinite
grammar:
ROOT <- WH TOKEN* WH
TOKEN <- &'word1'
WH <- [ \t]*

name: infinite_loop_spacing_with_eof
description: EOF is empty, making Spacing always succeed, making Number* infinite
grammar:
Numbers <- Number*
Number <- [0-9]+ / Spacing
Spacing <- ' ' / '\t' / '\n' / EOF
EOF <- !.

name: infinite_loop_empty_string_zom
description: Zero-or-more of empty string is infinite

name: infinite_loop_indirect_empty
description: Indirect empty string through a rule

name: infinite_loop_empty_choice_zom
description: Empty alternative in choice within repetition

name: infinite_loop_recover_empty_choice
description: Recovery of empty alternative in choice within repetition

name: not_infinite_eof_separate
description: EOF as separate non-repeating element is valid
grammar:
Numbers <- Number* EOF
Number <- [0-9]+ / Spacing
Spacing <- ' ' / '\t' / '\n'
EOF <- !.

name: not_infinite_sequence_nonempty
description: Sequence with non-empty element is valid even with empty elements

name: not_infinite_expression
description: Standard expression grammar is not infinite
grammar:
EXPRESSION <- _ TERM (TERM_OPERATOR TERM)*
TERM <- FACTOR (FACTOR_OPERATOR FACTOR)*
FACTOR <- NUMBER / '(' _ EXPRESSION ')' _
TERM_OPERATOR <- < [-+] > _
FACTOR_OPERATOR <- < [*/] > _
NUMBER <- < [0-9]+ > _
_ <- [ \t\r\n]*

name: infinite_loop_in_sequence
description: Infinite loop hidden in a sequence element

name: infinite_loop_in_prioritized_choice
description: Infinite loop hidden in one branch of prioritized choice
